methods.description: Collection of T. chinensis, water, and sediment samples for analysis of MCs and other parameters.

steps.description: T. chinensis samples were collected monthly with a 0.025 m² modified Peterson grab sampler from July 2013 to June 2014.
steps.searchable_summary: collect T. chinensis samples using Peterson grab sampler

steps.description: Sediment was sieved in situ through a 250 μm aperture mesh size sieve.
steps.searchable_summary: sieve sediment samples through 250 μm mesh

steps.description: T. chinensis specimens were sorted on a white tray and placed in beakers with tap water for 24 hours to clear gut contents.
steps.searchable_summary: sort and clear gut contents of T. chinensis specimens

steps.description: Specimens were stored in a 10 ml centrifuge tube at −80 °C until MC analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: store specimens at −80 °C for MC analysis

steps.description: Water samples were collected from the near surface (< 0.5 m) with a 2.5 L plexiglass water sampler.
steps.searchable_summary: collect water samples using plexiglass water sampler

steps.description: Water samples were preserved with 1% acidic Lugol's solution for phytoplankton identification.
steps.searchable_summary: preserve water samples with Lugol's solution

steps.description: Surface sediment samples were taken using a Peterson grab sampler and stored at −80 °C.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and store sediment samples at −80 °C

methods.description: Statistical analysis of environmental parameters and MC accumulation using SPSS.

steps.description: Conducted statistical analyses using IBM SPSS version 20.
steps.searchable_summary: perform statistical analysis using SPSS

steps.description: Calculated average, maximum, and minimum values of environmental parameters for 12 months.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate descriptive statistics for environmental parameters

steps.description: Conducted Spearman's correlation tests to examine correlations between environmental parameters and CMCs.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Spearman's correlation tests

steps.description: Excluded correlation coefficients exceeding 0.8 to avoid high collinearity.
steps.searchable_summary: exclude high collinearity variables

steps.description: Performed stepwise multiple linear regression analysis to identify key parameters associated with MC accumulation.
steps.searchable_summary: perform stepwise MLR analysis

steps.description: Standardized all variables by SPSS before data analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: standardize variables using SPSS

steps.description: Calculated TSI values based on chl-a, SD, and TP parameters.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate TSI values

methods.description: Measurement and analysis of various environmental parameters in the field and laboratory.

steps.description: Measured Temp, pH, and Cond in the field with a YSI 6600 V2 multi-sensor sonde.
steps.searchable_summary: measure Temp, pH, Cond using YSI sonde

steps.description: Measured SD in situ with a Secchi disc.
steps.searchable_summary: measure SD using Secchi disc

steps.description: Filtered samples for DTIC, DTOC, Chl-a, and TSS detection through Whatman GF/F filters.
steps.searchable_summary: filter samples using Whatman GF/F filters

steps.description: Determined DTIC and DTOC by high temperature combustion method.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze DTIC and DTOC by combustion

steps.description: Analyzed Chl-a and TSS using spectrophotometry.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze Chl-a and TSS spectrophotometrically

steps.description: Determined TN, NH4+-N, NO2−-N, NO3−-N, TP, PO43−-P, and DO using standard methods.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze nutrients and DO using standard methods

steps.description: Analyzed heavy metal content in sediment by ICP-AES.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze heavy metals using ICP-AES

methods.description: Analysis of MC concentrations in water and sediment samples using HPLC.

steps.description: Added 5% MeOH and 12 ml of 100% MeOH to wash and elute samples.
steps.searchable_summary: wash and elute samples with MeOH

steps.description: Dried eluent under N2 at 40 °C and re-dissolved residue in 100% MeOH.
steps.searchable_summary: dry and re-dissolve eluent in MeOH

steps.description: Applied solution to preconditioned silica gel cartridge for further processing.
steps.searchable_summary: process solution with silica gel cartridge

steps.description: Analyzed MC concentrations using HPLC.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze MC concentrations with HPLC
